192     .168     .3       .2
10101111.10011111.00000011.00000010
11111111.11111111.11111111.11111100
192.168.3.0

255.255.255.252

11111111 = 255
11111110 = 254
11111101 = 253
11111100 = 252
11111011 = 251
11111010 = 250
11111001 = 249
11111000 = 248

11000000 = 192
10101100 = 172
10101000 = 168





10.5.5.250/30

00001010.00000101.00000101.11111010
11111111.11111111.11111111.11111100
00001010.00000101.00000101.11111000

00001010.00000101.00000101.11111011


10.5.5.248 = Network ID
10.5.5.251 = Broadcast ID

255.255.255.252

255.255.255.0
